name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: English-source picker + SDH + re-translate: (1) new setting 'Ask which English to translate' (default OFF = auto) -> picker dialog with best-match first, SDH labelled. (2) SDH/hearing-impaired subs now flagged + labelled everywhere (speaker tags = better gender; prompt already drops the [..] noise but uses tags for gender). (3) 're-translate (ignore cache)' row in the subtitle dialog.
